name: WritersProof for Ironclad
tagline: Cryptographic proof of human authorship for every contract in your CLM
description: WritersProof for Ironclad adds cryptographic authorship attestation to the contract lifecycle. As legal teams draft, negotiate, and revise contracts in Ironclad, WritersProof captures tamper-evident proof of human authorship without storing contract content — only SHA-256 hashes. With AI-assisted drafting becoming commonplace in CLM platforms, WritersProof lets legal departments prove which contract language was genuinely human-authored versus machine-generated. Each contract carries a verifiable evidence chain from first draft through final execution, providing an immutable record of the authoring process.
features: Evidence capture during contract drafting and redlining in Ironclad Editor
Per-clause attestation granularity showing which sections have authorship proof
Workflow integration attaching attestation status at approval gates
Counterparty-visible attestation for negotiated contract terms
Template and playbook authorship tracking for standardized clauses
Contract repository attestation analytics across deal volume
API-driven attestation queries for integration with downstream compliance systems

requirements.integration_type: Ironclad API (OAuth 2.0) with webhook event subscriptions
requirements.browser: Chrome, Firefox, Edge, or Safari with WritersProof browser extension
